title: [Dhu Impress, Silk Garden]
description: Panels of pastel silk are stitched together to form a colorful, oversized sunshade protecting this opensided haon stall and the eye-delighting wares displayed here.  Amid the flower presses and journals set out on a couple of tables, vases are filled with fresh flowers that bring the outdoors inside with their bright blossoms and sweet fragrances.  Sunlight pours in, adding a cheerfulness to the cozy setting.
